text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally Winning Ticket's turn to make her
debut!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! M-my time is here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Th-the nerves are making my heart pound like
crazy! I'm feeling kinda itchy all over too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Am I gonna be okay?! I hope I can still run!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're really sure! That's reassuring,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I guess I do feel a little braver now. I can do
it! I'm gonna be fine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I let a little thing like a debut scare me, I'll
never make it to the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! I'm gonna give it all I got—FOR THE
DERBY!
